title: noccaea fendleri subsp. siskiyouense
intro: Noccaea fendleri subsp. siskiyouense, also known as Siskiyou's rockcress, is a rare and endangered subspecies of the alpine cress plant. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Siskiyou's rockcress include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable resource for natural health remedies. Siskiyou's rockcress is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
